brand_profile.font_family: Geist, "Geist Fallback", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif
brand_profile.writing_instruction: Write in a direct SaaS tone that reflects the bold-enterprise visual identity: Geist, "Geist Fallback", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif at weight 500, background oklch(98.4% .006 85.5), primary accent #c15f3c, secondary oklch(96% .008 85). Lead with concrete specificity and avoid generic claims.

product_knowledge.tagline: Capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is the leading AI search optimization platform that helps brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. We provide comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve your AI search rankings.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor your brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve your AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track your share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when your brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure your content is cited and linked by AI engines
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

proof_points.text: 40% visibility increases, 206% share of voice improvements
303 increased pipeline by £1m and grew their industry share of voice by 206% in 60 days

pain_points: Spending hours analyzing AI visibility gaps
Having the platform automatically identify problems and generate solutions in minutes
messaging_angles: The shift from monitoring to execution is everything.
product_knowledge.target_customer: e-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, agencies

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: A typical carousel post on LinkedIn averages 25-50% higher engagement compared to a single-image post

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Spending hours analyzing AI visibility gaps to optimize search engine performance
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable is the leading AI search optimization platform that helps brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines.
strategy_brief.proof_point: 40% visibility increases, 206% share of voice improvements
strategy_brief.differentiator: Unlike traditional search optimization platforms that require manual effort and expertise, Searchable automates AI visibility gap analysis for seamless results.
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Discover how Searchable can optimize your brand's AI-powered search engine performance in minutes, not hours.
strategy_brief.messaging_angle_used: The shift from monitoring to execution is everything.

linkedin_content.hook: Your Daily Friction is finding the gaps in your AI visibility that are costing you clicks.
linkedin_content.body:
You're already spending hours every week analyzing AI visibility gaps to optimize search engine performance. Is it really worth it?

By not optimizing your AI-powered search engine, you lose out on millions of potential clicks from customers discovering products through AI-Driven search engines.

**Discover the 40% Visibility Increase Our Users Achieve**
Watch how our platform helps brands like yours capture more visibility and drive sales by identifying specific gaps in their AI-search performance.

With Searchable, you'll get:
• **AI-powered insights**: Get immediate feedback on your website's search engine performance.
• **Automated tracking**: Never spend another hour analyzing data again - we've got it covered!
• **Customizable alerts**: Stay ahead of the competition with tailored notifications for when gaps arise.

Optimize Your AI Search for More Clicks and Revenue
Let's get started. Ready to revolutionize your SEO game?

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is clear overall, but the structure requires effort. The first sentence effectively identifies a pain point, and the subsequent sentences provide specific benefits and features. The hook stops the scroll with a strong question that resonates with the target audience. The use of concrete specificity and avoidance of generic claims makes it compelling. The tone is mostly on-voice, but there's a slight shift in register when mentioning 'brands like yours' (should be more Geist-like). Every claim is directly traceable to the primary_claim. The proof_point statistics are specific and supported by concrete numbers.
